message:
feat(sql): add ORDER BY to fused code generation

Implement sorted iteration for compiled queries with ORDER BY clauses.

Architecture:
- Generate sorted_indices array in function preamble
- Generate sort context with multi-column comparison
- Main loop iterates over sorted indices instead of raw indices

This completes the fused codegen support for:
- Filter/Project (direct loop)
- Window functions (pre-compute preamble)
- ORDER BY (sorted index iteration)

GROUP BY and JOIN correctly fall back to interpreted execution.
